changelog: v1.2.1: Sua loi dang nhap WorkAI that bai (HTTP 500) khi 'Lam moi Du an WorkAI' va 'Nhap viec'. Nguyen nhan: /api/setup khong ghi WORKAI_USERNAME vao .env, cac endpoint chi doc .env. Fix: dong bo WORKAI_USERNAME vao .env khi setup, them fallback config.json cho scan_projects, submitter, preview_helper.
